word: G2043 - ἐρείδω - ereídō - er-i'-do - Stick fast

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἐρείδω

- Transliteration: Ereido

- Phonetic: er-i'-do

- Definition:

1. to fix, prop firmly

- Origin: of obscure affinity

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: Of obscure affinity; to prop that is (reflexively) get fast: - stick fast.
